retry_reason: Not a wrapper — no retry semantics applicable.

judge.reason: The function is an SPI device probe that performs extensive initialization: allocating an IIO device, setting up channels, requesting IRQ, creating and registering a trigger (with a single iio_trigger_get call), setting up a buffer, handling a regulator, configuring a clock, and performing hardware configuration. The sole refcount operation (iio_trigger_get) is a minor step embedded within dozens of lines of unrelated business logic. The function does not return a reference-counted object; it returns an error code. Its primary purpose is device initialization and registration, not reference-count management.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — no retry semantics applicable.
